title: Feeding Indicators
description: See what any animal eats and when they're ready to breed or be tamed with helpful floating item indicators.
body:
This mod adds visual indicators to animals so you don't have to check a wiki for breeding or taming requirements.

### Features
- **Breeding**: Icons appear above animals when you hold their food. Indicators only show for adults that are not currently on a breeding cooldown.
- **Diet**: Crouch and look at any animal to cycle through every item it can eat. **Full modded animals support!**
  
### Configuration
Using Mod Menu, you can disable the mod or change icon size/height.
